docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$158.75);(PROOF OF SERVICE STAMPED:'FILED BY FAX - CA RULE 2.303) SERVED JUL-14-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT 1800 FRANKLIN LP
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARK GOLDSTONE, VICE PRESIDENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT 1800 FRANKLIN LP

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,275.66 FILED BY PORTO, CATHERINE AS TO DEFENDANT 1800 FRANKLIN LP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
OVERPAYMENT ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM (SC-100), TRAN # W1622707O008, TAG # 036971 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTO, CATHERINE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-07-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-06-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CATHERINE PORTO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 1800 FRANKLIN LP IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARK GOLDSTONE (VICE PRESIDENT) AND SUSAN CAUST (PROPERTY MANAGER). COURT ALLOWS SUSAN CAUST TO PROVIDE TESTIMONY ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT 1800 FRANKLIN LP. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1,525.53 (WHICH INCLUDES COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF. PAYMENT TO BE MADE BY CHECK. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE OCT-06-2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
